pageContext.name: DeLorean III Full Set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - DeLorean III Full Set! Based on the likeness of both Christopher Lloyd and Michael J. Fox as well as the original movie references, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.  Back to the Future fans, don't miss your chance to add the DeLorean III Full Set to your collection!
